title: ManyManyCommands
description: A mod that add many usefull commands like « /homes », « /warps », « /back », « /wild », « /tpa »
body:
A mod that add many usefull commands like « /homes », « /warps », « /back »,
« /wild », « /tpa »

For example, with the « /homes » command set, players can create their own personal warps (called homes) in the world that they can teleport back to at any time. Players can also use the « /wild » command to randomly teleport to the map.
There are also a lot of configurable rules that allow for example to limit the number of homes for certain players



This mod works server side without having the mod on the client. He also works in singleplayer.
The latest version (0.0.1+1.19.3) require

Java:  >= 17

Minecraft:  >= 1.19.3

Fabric Loader: >= 0.12.14

Fabric API: >= 0.73.2+1.19.3

Fabric Language Kotlin: >= 1.9.1+kotlin.1.8.10

Silk: >= 1.9.5

ManyManyCommands API:  >= 0.0.1+1.19.3



Also, I recommend using the « Luckperms » and « Fabric Perms Hider Kotlined » mods. You will be able to disable the commands you don't want.
